groups.label: Transparency Exchange Language
groups.note: The CycloneDX Transparency Exchange Language is a superset of CycloneDX BOM. Everything you know and love, reimagined and expanded.

releases.description: A modular file format and API specification that unifies Bill of Materials with complete supply chain transparency including architectural blueprints, threat, behavioral, and risk modeling, AI and agentic capabilities, compliance attestations, and post-quantum cryptography readiness.

The international standard for inventorying software, hardware, services, cryptographic assets, and AI models with dependency graphs, vulnerability disclosures, licensing, build formulation, and assembly completeness.
